message:
refactor(tui): reformat agents screen for rustfmt compliance and update tests for project-qualified identity

- Reformat long method chains, closure bodies, and assert! macro
  arguments across AgentsScreen to satisfy rustfmt line-width limits
- Update test_agent_row() call sites to pass all 6 positional arguments
  matching the project-qualified AgentIdentity changes from the prior
  commit
- Fix focused_event_returns_agent_registered_synthetic test to pass
  project field and assert it in the pattern match
- Update fetch_agent_rows_from_sqlite test: add projects table creation,
  use agent_identity() helper for msg_counts keys, rename test to
  reflect the broader row-fetching scope

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
